name: Bioweapon Blueprint
text: Terrorists used an open-weight model to walk them through creating a lethal bioweapon. To combat the new pandemic with more than yearlong lockdowns, the government decided to relax the treaty and enable AGI development for vaccine research.
image-prompt: A biosafety lab with a computer screen showing molecular structures, a researcher looking alarmed at the output, biohazard symbols on the wall, sterile fluorescent lighting with an ominous undertone, digital painting, no text
